info.name: Amadeus Returns a Percentage of On-time Flight Departures from a Given Airport.

params.name: date
params.description: the date on which the traveler will depart from the give airport. Dates are specified in the [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601) YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. 2019-12-25

items.docs: Amadeus Returns a Percentage of On-time Flight Departures from a Given Airport.
